    C

    CASIO_VZ - Statische Variable in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxChecksum
    Check sum aggregation Casio VZ-1/VZ-10M style.
    checkUID(String) - Statische Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxParamInfo
    Checks if a unique parameter name is valid.
    clear() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
    Clears this message (remove parts and parameter map).
    clone() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
     
    close() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.util.MidiInterface
    Closes the MIDI out and in ports.
    closeInPort() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.util.MidiInterface
    Closes the MIDI in port (only).
    closeOutPort() - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.util.MidiInterface
    Closes the MIDI out port (only).
    CommandNotAcceptedException() - Konstruktor für Ausnahmeklasse de.btu.kt.syx.util.AAppc.CommandNotAcceptedException
     
    computeChecksum(int, byte[]) - Statische Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxChecksum
    Computes the SysEx checksum for a byte array.
    computeCheckSum(SyxMessage) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxChecksum
    Computes the checksum over parts of a system exclusive message.
    computeChecksumAdd(byte[]) - Statische Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxChecksum
    Computes the SysEx checksum for a byte array aggregating by summation.
    computeChecksumCasioVz(byte[]) - Statische Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxChecksum
    Computes the SysEx checksum for a byte array aggregating Casio VZ style.
    computeChecksumRoland(byte[]) - Statische Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxChecksum
    Computes the SysEx checksum for a byte array aggregating Roland style.
    computeChecksumXor(byte[]) - Statische Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxChecksum
    Computes the SysEx checksum for a byte array aggregating by XOR.
    copy(SyxMessage) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxMessage
    Makes a shallow copy of another message.
    CREATE - Statische Variable in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.SYX
    Option for SYX.getPath(...): Create resource (folder); default is do not create.
    createMI() - Statische Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.tutorials.GettingStarted
    Demonstrates how to create a SYX MIDI interface.
    createParamChangeMsg(String, char, int) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Creates system exclusive parameter change messages for given parameter names.
    createParamChangeMsg(String, int) - Methode in Klasse de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
    Creates system exclusive parameter change messages for given parameter names.
